message:
fix(sync): bound create_resource() by remaining acquire_timeout in GenericPool

GenericPool::acquire() called create_resource().await without any
timeout bound, so a hanging factory could block indefinitely even
after the acquire_timeout had already elapsed. This left callers
stuck on a slow resource factory with no way to time out.

Compute the remaining budget from (acquire_timeout - elapsed) and
wrap create_resource() in crate::time::timeout(). If the budget is
already exhausted, return PoolError::Timeout immediately. If the
factory exceeds the remaining budget, return PoolError::Timeout
after recording the timeout metric.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
